item.title: Why the Menendez Case Divided a Nation
item.description: Georgia Marie explores why the Menendez case sparked widespread debate and divided public opinion.

media:content.media:title: Why the Menendez Case Divided a Nation
media:content.media:description: Georgia Marie explores why the Menendez case sparked widespread debate and divided public opinion.

item.title: The Disturbing Truth Behind Grégory’s Villemin Tragedy
item.description: Georgia Marie explores the background of the Grégory Villemin case in a concise, factual look at the tragedy.

media:content.media:title: The Disturbing Truth Behind Grégory’s Villemin Tragedy

item.title: The Unsolved Case of Billie-Jo Jenkins
item.description: Georgia Marie explores the unsolved case of Billie-Jo Jenkins in a concise, factual look at the mystery.

item.title: The story behind “The Clown"
item.description: A factual overview of John Wayne Gacy’s crimes, investigation, and arrest, as covered by Georgia Marie, highlighting key details of the case.

media:content.media:title: The story behind “The Clown"
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of John Wayne Gacy’s crimes, investigation, and arrest, as covered by Georgia Marie, highlighting key details of the case.

item.title: The Dark Original Story Of “The Sleeping Beauty”
item.description: A look at the historical origins of the Sleeping Beauty tale, exploring earlier versions of the story and how they differ from the modern retelling.

media:content.media:title: The Dark Original Story Of “The Sleeping Beauty”
media:content.media:description: A look at the historical origins of the Sleeping Beauty tale, exploring earlier versions of the story and how they differ from the modern retelling.
